paragraphs.title: Resumen del Pipeline
paragraphs.text:
%spark
// Resumen de tablas disponibles en el proyecto Logistica
import org.apache.spark.sql.functions._

val tables = spark.sql("SHOW TABLES IN logistica")
tables.show(50, false)

paragraphs.title: Estadisticas de Ships
paragraphs.text:
%spark
// Conteo de posiciones de barcos
val ships = spark.table("logistica.stg_ships")
println(s"Total registros ships: ${ships.count()}")
ships.groupBy("dest_port").count().show()

paragraphs.title: Alertas Climaticas
paragraphs.text:
%spark
// Conteo de alertas climaticas
val clima = spark.table("logistica.stg_alerts_clima")
println(s"Total alertas clima: ${clima.count()}")
clima.groupBy("region").count().show()

paragraphs.title: Alertas Noticias
paragraphs.text:
%spark
// Conteo de alertas geopoliticas
val noticias = spark.table("logistica.stg_alerts_noticias")
println(s"Total alertas noticias: ${noticias.count()}")
noticias.groupBy("region").count().show()

paragraphs.title: Stock Valladolid
paragraphs.text:
%spark
// Articulos en stock
val stock = spark.table("logistica.dim_articles_valladolid")
println(s"Total articulos: ${stock.count()}")
stock.select("article_ref", "article_name", "total_stock_pieces", "safety_stock_min").show(20, false)

paragraphs.title: Pedidos Douai
paragraphs.text:
%spark
// Pedidos de clientes Francia
val orders = spark.table("logistica.fact_customer_orders_douai")
println(s"Total pedidos: ${orders.count()}")
orders.show(10, false)
